rationale.R1.2: Identifies three major contradictions and several softer issues, proposes minimal repairs.
rationale.RX.1: For each recommendation, marks uncertainty and missing evidence.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: Output introduces new errors (contradictions) in the original.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason.
